message:
feat(decision): add pooled FDR control across fleet hosts

Implements fleet-wide false discovery rate management with per-host alpha
budgets, e-value pooling for cross-host evidence, proportional/equal/
sequential allocation strategies, automatic halt on FDR violation, and
host quarantine for abnormal patterns.

Closes process_triage-txan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
